description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, review, staging, production, and cleanup and a global variable KUBE_DOMAIN set to getup.io. In the build stage add a build job that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, runs only on branches, and executes docker login -u \"gitlab-ci-token\" -p \"$CI_JOB_TOKEN\" $CI_REGISTRY, docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME\" ., docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME\", and echo \"Pushing image $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME\". In the review stage add a review job using lucassabreu/openshift-k8s-cli:latest, runs on branches except master, sets environment r/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with URL http://$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG.$KUBE_DOMAIN and on_stop stop_review, and runs k8s/deploy. In the staging stage add a staging job with the same image, runs only on master, sets environment staging with URL http://$CI_PROJECT_NAME-staging.$KUBE_DOMAIN, and runs k8s/deploy. In the production stage add a manual production job using the same image, runs only on master, sets environment production with URL http://$CI_PROJECT_NAME.$KUBE_DOMAIN, defines CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL accordingly, and runs k8s/deploy. Finally, add a manual cleanup job named stop_review that runs on branches except master, uses the same image, sets environment action stop for r/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, and runs oc login \"$KUBE_URL\" --token \"$KUBE_TOKEN\", oc project \"$KUBE_NAMESPACE\", oc delete deployments -l \"app=$CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG\", and oc delete all -l \"app=$CI_ENVIRONMENT_SLUG\".
